_primaryContact: Josh Hendrick (H&M owner) — internal only. Public site CTAs (hero, about, contact form, JSON-LD) use the client line 251-240-8386. ONLY the 'Make This Website Yours' purchase CTA routes to EP Media via purchase.contactPhone (251-223-0812), since that's a lead about buying the website.
_brandMapping: Client palette: Primary #050505 (black bg), Secondary #F2F2F2 (weathered silver text — factory default ink #F8F6F0 is used), Accent #B88A32 (construction gold). Mapped to factory roles: brand-primary=gold accent, brand-secondary/surface=black defaults (kept), brand-accent=lighter gold for gradient/focus.
description: H&M Services provides property maintenance, outdoor construction, land clearing, removal, and improvement services for residential and commercial property owners in Fairhope and surrounding areas.

pillars.label: Build
pillars.blurb: Excavation, concrete, masonry, fences, and structures.

pillars.label: Maintain
pillars.blurb: Lawn care, drainage, irrigation, and property upkeep.

pillars.label: Remove
pillars.blurb: Land clearing, demolition, tree and stump removal.

pillars.label: Improve
pillars.blurb: Grading, hauling, painting, and property upgrades.

services.name: Excavation & Grading
services.description: Site preparation, dirt work, grading, and property improvement.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.description: Clearing overgrowth, brush, debris, and unwanted property material.

services.name: Drainage Work
services.description: Property drainage improvements and water-management solutions.

services.name: Demolition & Removal
services.description: Removal of unwanted structures, debris, and property obstructions.

services.name: Tree & Stump Removal
services.description: Tree cleanup, stump removal, and related property clearing.

services.name: Concrete & Flatwork
services.description: Concrete-related property improvements and outdoor flatwork.

services.name: Masonry & Brick Work
services.description: Brick, block, and masonry improvement services.

services.name: Fence Installation
services.description: Fence construction, replacement, and property-boundary improvements.

services.name: Sheds & Small Structures
services.description: Shed, outbuilding, and small property-structure work.

services.name: Outdoor Fireplaces
services.description: Outdoor fireplace and hardscape feature construction.

services.name: Lawn & Property Maintenance
services.description: General outdoor maintenance to keep residential and commercial properties clean and functional.

services.name: Irrigation Services
services.description: Irrigation installation, repair, and related outdoor water systems.

services.name: Dirt, Gravel & Material Hauling
services.description: Delivery, removal, and hauling of dirt, gravel, rock, and materials.

services.name: Dump-Truck Services
services.description: Hauling and material movement for property and construction projects.

whyUs.title: Local to Baldwin County
whyUs.text: Based in Fairhope and serving the surrounding Gulf Coast communities.

whyUs.title: One Call, Many Services
whyUs.text: From earthwork to finishing, a wide range of property services under one roof.

whyUs.title: Residential & Commercial
whyUs.text: Property work for homeowners and businesses alike.

brand.styleNotes: Rugged premium: black steel, weathered silver, construction gold, heavy equipment. Clean modern layout — not a generic landscaping template.

seo.title: H&M Services | Property Services in Fairhope, Alabama
seo.description: H&M Services provides property maintenance, excavation, clearing, removal, hauling, and outdoor improvement services in Fairhope and surrounding Baldwin County communities.
